members.title: 降灰予報（定時）
members.snippet: 【火山名　薩摩硫黄島　降灰予報（定時）】　現在、薩摩硫黄島は噴火警戒レベル２（火口周辺規制）です。薩摩硫黄島で噴火が発生した場合には、１２日０９時から１２時までは火口から北西方向に降灰が予想されます。

members.snippet: The former government minister is believed to have been attacked a full day before her body was discovered.

events.headline: Power cuts plunge Gaza hospitals into darkness as Israel’s attacks persist

members.title: Power cuts plunge Gaza hospitals into darkness as Israel’s attacks persist
members.snippet: Gaza is suffering from an energy crisis, affecting hospitals struggling to treat patients amid Israeli bombing.

events.headline: What is going on in Yemen?

members.title: What is going on in Yemen?
members.snippet: Tensions are rising in the battlefield and political sphere. Will the conflict reignite?
